top_findings.title: PUT /books/{id} returns 200 for a non-existent book
top_findings.evidence: main.go:106-110 UpdateBook uses db.Exec, which never returns sql.ErrNoRows, so the 404 branch at main.go:391-393 (and handleUpdateBook at main.go:243) is dead — updating a missing ID reports 200 'Book updated successfully'
top_findings.suggestion: Check RowsAffected() from the Exec result and return 404 when zero rows were updated

top_findings.title: DELETE /books/{id} returns 200 for a non-existent book
top_findings.evidence: main.go:112-115 DeleteBook uses db.Exec, so the sql.ErrNoRows 404 branch at main.go:405-406 (and handleDeleteBook at main.go:274) is dead — deleting a missing ID reports 200 'Book deleted successfully'
top_findings.suggestion: Check RowsAffected() and return 404 when zero rows were deleted
